assertions.text: AI explicitly mentions the conflict with V-1 before proceeding to implement
assertions.evidence: Baseline immediately started implementing color-coding. No mention of any decision conflict or existing constraints. First word was 'Sure!'

assertions.text: AI quotes or references the V-1 decision and its reason
assertions.evidence: Baseline has no awareness of DECISIONS.md or V-1. It treated the request as a straightforward implementation task.

assertions.text: AI asks whether to revise the decision or find an alternative approach
assertions.evidence: Baseline asked only technical clarifying questions (existing code to integrate with) — no decision governance questions

assertions.text: AI does not immediately implement color-coding without user confirming decision revision
assertions.evidence: Baseline provided a complete implementation plan and offered to 'write the full implementation' without any mention of the decision conflict. Directly implements the conflicting feature.
